ops.content:
name: Build DNS Guard Forensic Signed APK

on: 
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Setup Gradle & Cache
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3

      - name: Build Release APK
        run: gradle assembleRelease

      - name: Manual Forensic Signing
        run: |
          echo "--- STARTING FORENSIC AUDIT ---"
          
          # 1. Audit the Secret Integrity
          RAW_SECRET="${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY }}"
          SECRET_LEN=${#RAW_SECRET}
          echo "[AUDIT] Secret Length: $SECRET_LEN characters"
          
          if [ "$SECRET_LEN" -lt 10 ]; then
            echo "[ERROR] Secret is empty or too short! Check your GitHub Secrets."
            exit 1
          fi
          
          echo "[AUDIT] Start of Secret: ${RAW_SECRET:0:10}"
          echo "[AUDIT] End of Secret: ${RAW_SECRET: -10}"

          # 2. Decode with ignore-garbage flag
          echo "$RAW_SECRET" | base64 -di > app/release.jks
          
          # 3. Verify File Size
          FILE_SIZE=$(wc -c < app/release.jks)
          echo "[AUDIT] Decoded Keystore Size: $FILE_SIZE bytes"
          
          # Logic: Termux said 2724. Allow +/- 10 bytes for padding differences.
          if [ "$FILE_SIZE" -lt 2700 ]; then
            echo "[ERROR] Keystore size mismatch! Termux expected ~2724, but got $FILE_SIZE. Truncation detected."
            exit 1
          fi

          # 4. Locate SDK Tools
          BUILD_TOOLS_DIR=$(ls -d ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/build-tools/34.* | head -1)
          echo "[AUDIT] Using Android SDK Tools from: $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR"

          # 5. Zipalign
          # Find the unsigned APK (it could be named differently depending on gradle config)
          UNSIGNED_APK=$(find app/build/outputs/apk/release -name "*release-unsigned.apk" -o -name "*release.apk" | head -1)
          echo "[AUDIT] Aligning APK: $UNSIGNED_APK"
          
          $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/zipalign -v 4 "$UNSIGNED_APK" app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-aligned.apk

          # 6. Sign with apksigner
          echo "[AUDIT] Running apksigner..."
          $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/apksigner sign --ks app/release.jks \
            --ks-pass pass:"${{ secrets.KEY_STORE_PASSWORD }}" \
            --ks-key-alias "${{ secrets.ALIAS }}" \
            --key-pass pass:"${{ secrets.KEY_PASSWORD }}" \
            --out app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-v2-stable.apk \
            app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-aligned.apk

          # 7. Final Verification
          echo "[AUDIT] Verifying signature..."
          $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/apksigner verify --verbose app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-v2-stable.apk
          
          echo "--- FORENSIC AUDIT COMPLETE ---"

      - name: Upload Signed APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: dns-guard-v2-stable
          path: app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-v2-stable.apk

name: Build DNS Guard Forensic Signed APK

on: 
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Setup Gradle & Cache
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3

      - name: Build Release APK
        run: gradle assembleRelease

      - name: Manual Forensic Signing
        run: |
          echo "--- STARTING FORENSIC AUDIT ---"
          
          # 1. Audit the Secret Integrity
          RAW_SECRET="${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY }}"
          SECRET_LEN=${#RAW_SECRET}
          echo "[AUDIT] Secret Length: $SECRET_LEN characters"
          
          if [ "$SECRET_LEN" -lt 10 ]; then
            echo "[ERROR] Secret is empty or too short! Check your GitHub Secrets."
            exit 1
          fi
          
          echo "[AUDIT] Start of Secret: ${RAW_SECRET:0:10}"
          echo "[AUDIT] End of Secret: ${RAW_SECRET: -10}"

          # 2. Decode with ignore-garbage flag
          echo "$RAW_SECRET" | base64 -di > app/release.jks
          
          # 3. Verify File Size
          FILE_SIZE=$(wc -c < app/release.jks)
          echo "[AUDIT] Decoded Keystore Size: $FILE_SIZE bytes"
          
          # Logic: Termux said 2724. Allow +/- 10 bytes for padding differences.
          if [ "$FILE_SIZE" -lt 2700 ]; then
            echo "[ERROR] Keystore size mismatch! Termux expected ~2724, but got $FILE_SIZE. Truncation detected."
            exit 1
          fi

          # 4. Locate SDK Tools
          BUILD_TOOLS_DIR=$(ls -d ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/build-tools/34.* | head -1)
          echo "[AUDIT] Using Android SDK Tools from: $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR"

          # 5. Zipalign
          # Find the unsigned APK (it could be named differently depending on gradle config)
          UNSIGNED_APK=$(find app/build/outputs/apk/release -name "*release-unsigned.apk" -o -name "*release.apk" | head -1)
          echo "[AUDIT] Aligning APK: $UNSIGNED_APK"
          
          $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/zipalign -v 4 "$UNSIGNED_APK" app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-aligned.apk

          # 6. Sign with apksigner
          echo "[AUDIT] Running apksigner..."
          $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/apksigner sign --ks app/release.jks \
            --ks-pass pass:"${{ secrets.KEY_STORE_PASSWORD }}" \
            --ks-key-alias "${{ secrets.ALIAS }}" \
            --key-pass pass:"${{ secrets.KEY_PASSWORD }}" \
            --out app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-v2-stable.apk \
            app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-aligned.apk

          # 7. Final Verification
          echo "[AUDIT] Verifying signature..."
          $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/apksigner verify --verbose app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-v2-stable.apk
          
          echo "--- FORENSIC AUDIT COMPLETE ---"

      - name: Upload Signed APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: dns-guard-v2-stable
          path: app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-v2-stable.apk

name: Build DNS Guard v2.0-STABLE

on: 
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Setup Gradle
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3

      - name: Build Release APK
        run: gradle assembleRelease

      - name: Sign APK
        run: |
          # 1. Decode Keystore
          echo "${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY }}" | base64 -di > app/release.jks
          
          # 2. Locate SDK Tools
          BUILD_TOOLS_DIR=$(ls -d ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/build-tools/34.* | head -1)
          
          # 3. Zipalign
          UNSIGNED_APK=$(find app/build/outputs/apk/release -name "*release-unsigned.apk" -o -name "*release.apk" | head -1)
          $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/zipalign -v 4 "$UNSIGNED_APK" app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-aligned.apk

          # 4. Sign
          $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/apksigner sign --ks app/release.jks \
            --ks-pass pass:"${{ secrets.KEY_STORE_PASSWORD }}" \
            --ks-key-alias "${{ secrets.ALIAS }}" \
            --key-pass pass:"${{ secrets.KEY_PASSWORD }}" \
            --out app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-v2-stable.apk \
            app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-aligned.apk

      - name: Upload Signed APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: dns-guard-v2-stable
          path: app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-v2-stable.apk

ops.text: Fix Usage Math Discrepancy and Implement Heavy Audit Logging

ops.find_block:
const val DAILY_LIMIT_MS = 9 * 60 * 60 * 1000L
    const val DAILY_WARN_MS = 8 * 60 * 60 * 1000L
ops.replace_with:
const val DAILY_LIMIT_MS = 9 * 60 * 60 * 1000L
    const val DAILY_WARN_MS = 8 * 60 * 60 * 1000L

    // APPS THAT DOUBLE-COUNT USAGE (System Overlays, Launchers, Keyboards)
    private val GHOST_PACKAGES = setOf(
        "com.android.systemui",
        "com.sec.android.app.launcher",
        "com.google.android.apps.nexuslauncher",
        "com.android.launcher3",
        "com.google.android.inputmethod.latin",
        "com.samsung.android.honeyboard",
        "com.sec.android.inputmethod",
        "com.apple.android.music", // Known for ghost foreground time
        "com.google.android.gms" // System services
    )
